detaileddescription.para:
Initialize engine config for a specific engine ID.
engineId
The engine to configure
This method does NOT finalize the engine config. The caller must finalize after setting any knobs on the config.

memberdef.type: std::pair< std::unordered_set< std::shared_ptr< TensorAttributes > >, std::unordered_set< std::shared_ptr< TensorAttributes > > >
memberdef.definition: std::pair< std::unordered_set< std::shared_ptr< TensorAttributes > >, std::unordered_set< std::shared_ptr< TensorAttributes > > > hipdnn_frontend::graph::Graph::getGraphInputTensorAttributesAndRemainder
memberdef.name: getGraphInputTensorAttributesAndRemainder

briefdescription.para: Construct an empty Graph.
Validate the graph structure and tensor configurations.

detaileddescription.para:
Error indicating success or describing validation failures
Validates that:
All tensors have required attributes set
No duplicate tensor UIDs exist
Graph is a valid DAG (no cycles)
Graph is connected (no orphaned nodes)
Checks if all tensors in the graph have UIDs assigned. Returns an error if any tensor is missing a UID.

Returns a map of UID -> TensorAttributes for all tensors in the graph. Tensors without UIDs are skipped (no error is generated).
Map from tensor UID to tensor attributes

Returns a map of name -> TensorAttributes for all tensors in the graph. Tensors without names are skipped (no error is generated).
Map from tensor name to tensor attributes

briefdescription.para: Build the operation graph descriptor.

detaileddescription.para:
handle
The hipDNN handle
Error indicating success or failure
This is typically called internally by build(). It creates the backend operation graph descriptor from the frontend graph representation.

briefdescription.para: Get available configuration knobs for a specific engine.

parameterdescription.para: Output vector of available Knob objects

briefdescription.para: Get a ranked list of engine IDs based on heuristics.

parameterdescription.para: Output vector of engine IDs, ranked by expected performance
Heuristic modes to use for ranking

briefdescription.para: Create execution plans using heuristics.

detaileddescription.para:
modes
Heuristic modes to use for engine selection
Error indicating success or failure
Creates execution plans by querying the backend for available engines and selecting based on the specified heuristic modes.

briefdescription.para: Create an execution plan with specific engine and knob settings.

detaileddescription.para:
engineId
The engine ID to use
settings
Vector of KnobSetting objects to configure the engine
Error indicating success or failure
This method allows fine-grained control over engine selection and configuration through knob settings.
Serialize to FlatBuffer DetachedBuffer (const version) Returns error if tensor UIDs are not set
Serialize to FlatBuffer DetachedBuffer (non-const version) Assigns tensor UIDs if not already set

briefdescription.para: Deserialize from FlatBuffer Graph object.
Deserialize from FlatBuffer DetachedBuffer.

detaileddescription.para: Serialize to FlatBuffer DetachedBuffer (const version) Returns error if tensor UIDs are not set

briefdescription.para: Deserialize from FlatBuffer Graph object.
Deserialize from FlatBuffer DetachedBuffer.

detaileddescription.para: Serialize to binary (const version) Returns error if tensor UIDs are not set
Serialize to binary (non-const version) Assigns tensor UIDs if not already set

briefdescription.para: Deserialize from binary packed FlatBuffer.

detaileddescription.para: Serialize to JSON (const version) Returns error if tensor UIDs are not set

Flow: Frontend → FlatBuffer binary → JSON GetGraph() is zero-copy (just a pointer into the buffer), so the only serialization cost is buildFlatbufferOperationGraphConst(). This keeps JSON serialization logic centralized in data_sdk.
Serialize to JSON (non-const version) Assigns tensor UIDs if not already set

briefdescription.para: Deserialize from JSON.
Finalize the execution plan.

detaileddescription.para:
Error indicating success or failure
Called internally by build() after create_execution_plans().

memberdef.argsstring: (hipdnnHandle_t handle, std::vector< HeuristicMode > const &modes={HeuristicMode::FALLBACK}, BuildPlanPolicy policy=BuildPlanPolicy::HEURISTICS_CHOICE, bool do_multithreaded_builds=false)
memberdef.name: build

briefdescription.para: Build the complete graph and create execution plans.

detaileddescription.para:
handle
The hipDNN handle
modes
Heuristic modes for engine selection
policy
Build plan policy (currently only HEURISTICS_CHOICE is used)
do_multithreaded_builds
Reserved for future use
Error indicating success or failure
This is the main method to prepare a graph for execution. It performs:
Graph validation
Operation graph building
Execution plan creation
Plan building

briefdescription.para: Get the workspace memory size required for execution.

detaileddescription.para:
workspaceSize
Output parameter for the workspace size in bytes
Error indicating success or failure
Call this after build() to determine how much workspace memory to allocate.

memberdef.argsstring: (hipdnnHandle_t handle, std::unordered_map< std::shared_ptr< TensorAttributes >, void * > &tensorLookup, void *workspace) const
memberdef.name: execute

briefdescription.para: Execute the graph with tensor pointers mapped by tensor handles.

parameterdescription.para: Map from std::shared_ptr<TensorAttributes> (tensor handles) to device memory pointers
Pointer to workspace memory (can be nullptr if size is 0)

memberdef.argsstring: (hipdnnHandle_t handle, std::unordered_map< int64_t, void * > &variantPack, void *workspace) const
memberdef.name: execute

briefdescription.para: Execute the graph with tensor pointers mapped by UID.

parameterdescription.para: Map from tensor UID to device memory pointers
Pointer to workspace memory (can be nullptr if size is 0)

memberdef.argsstring: (std::shared_ptr< TensorAttributes > x, std::shared_ptr< TensorAttributes > scale, std::shared_ptr< TensorAttributes > bias, BatchnormAttributes attributes)
memberdef.name: batchnorm

memberdef.argsstring: (std::shared_ptr< TensorAttributes > dy, std::shared_ptr< TensorAttributes > x, std::shared_ptr< TensorAttributes > scale, BatchnormBackwardAttributes attributes)
memberdef.name: batchnorm_backward

memberdef.name: batchnorm_inference

memberdef.argsstring: (std::shared_ptr< TensorAttributes > x, std::shared_ptr< TensorAttributes > mean, std::shared_ptr< TensorAttributes > variance, std::shared_ptr< TensorAttributes > scale, std::shared_ptr< TensorAttributes > bias, std::shared_ptr< TensorAttributes > epsilon, BatchnormInferenceAttributesVarianceExt attributes)
memberdef.name: batchnorm_inference_variance_ext

memberdef.argsstring: (std::shared_ptr< TensorAttributes > in0, std::shared_ptr< TensorAttributes > in1, PointwiseAttributes attributes)
memberdef.name: pointwise

memberdef.argsstring: (std::shared_ptr< TensorAttributes > in0, std::shared_ptr< TensorAttributes > in1, std::shared_ptr< TensorAttributes > in2, PointwiseAttributes attributes)
memberdef.name: pointwise

memberdef.name: matmul

memberdef.argsstring: (std::shared_ptr< TensorAttributes > x, std::shared_ptr< TensorAttributes > w, ConvFpropAttributes attributes)
memberdef.name: conv_fprop

memberdef.argsstring: (std::shared_ptr< TensorAttributes > dy, std::shared_ptr< TensorAttributes > w, ConvDgradAttributes attributes)
memberdef.name: conv_dgrad

memberdef.argsstring: (std::shared_ptr< TensorAttributes > dy, std::shared_ptr< TensorAttributes > x, ConvWgradAttributes attributes)
memberdef.name: conv_wgrad

briefdescription.para: Create a new tensor with similar properties to an existing tensor.

detaileddescription.para:
tensor
The tensor to copy properties from
name
Optional name for the new tensor
Shared pointer to the newly created TensorAttributes
Creates a new TensorAttributes object by copying properties from the provided tensor, but clears the UID and optionally assigns a new name. This is useful for creating tensors with similar dimensions and data types but representing different data.

simplesect.para: tensor() for creating a tensor with all properties preserved

briefdescription.para: Create a new tensor from existing tensor attributes.

detaileddescription.para:
tensor
The tensor attributes to copy
Shared pointer to the newly created TensorAttributes
Creates a new TensorAttributes object as a copy of the provided tensor, preserving all properties including UID. This is the standard way to create a tensor for use in graph operations.

simplesect.para: tensor_like() for creating a tensor with cleared UID and custom name

briefdescription.para: The main class for building and executing hipDNN computational graphs.

detaileddescription.para:
Graph is the central class in hipDNN Frontend. It allows users to:
Define tensors and their properties
Add operation nodes (convolution, batchnorm, pointwise, matmul)
Build execution plans
Execute the graph on AMD GPUs
The Graph class uses a fluent interface pattern, where setter methods return a reference to the graph for method chaining.
